description.value:
While all fonqugons are children of the fonqon trees, you're a rare fonqugon whose gestation took place over the course of 17 days instead of the typical seven, which often occurs when a fonqon tree is in especially dire circumstances. As such, you're much more connected to the trees' primal magic than a typical fonqugon. Choose one cantrip from the primal spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a primal innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Fonqugons must adapt to meet any challenge or threat that arises, and your magic is equally adaptable. By spending 1 day of downtime in a natural environment with any trees, you can change the cantrip you chose with this feat to a different primal cantrip.

Special You can take this feat only at 1st level, and you can't retrain into this feat.
